description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a long, cylindrical barrel and an integrated scope mounted on top, suggesting it is optimized for precision shooting. The body is primarily matte black with metallic and polymer components, and the stock is compact with a padded butt, likely for recoil absorption. The trigger area is protected by a squared, reinforced guard, and the grip is ergonomic, designed for secure handling. The receiver and fore-end display mechanical detailing, including rails and attachment points for accessories. The overall build appears modern, with a mix of metal and synthetic materials, and the shotgun is equipped with a visible magazine beneath the receiver. Subtle color accents, such as blue and orange highlights, add to its tactical appearance.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a long barrel, integrated scope, and compact padded stock, featuring black and metallic finishes with colored accents. The design is robust and ergonomic, optimized for precision and control.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular muzzle, scope lens, and symmetrical alignment of the barrel and attachments.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the barrel, scope, ergonomic grip, and compact stock with visible colored accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded buttstock, scope eyepiece, and the squared trigger guard, emphasizing the shotgun's symmetry.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the magazine, trigger area, and additional mechanical details, mirroring the left side's tactical features.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, reinforced trigger guard with a robust, elongated shape
